name: Brie and Canadian Bacon Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Place Canadian bacon slices, slightly overlapping, around the side and bottom of a 9-inch deep-dish pie plate coated with cooking spray. Set aside.
2. Combine eggs, mayonnaise, pepper, Parmesan cheese, Brie, and Italian herb seasonings in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
4. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
5. After 15 minutes of baking, place foil over the bacon to protect it from overcooking.
6. Yields 6 to 8 servings.
